/usr/bin/c++   -march=core2 -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -mno-sse4.1 -mno-sse4.2 -mno-sse4a -mno-avx -mno-fma -mno-bmi2 -mno-avx2 -mno-xop -mno-fma4 -mno-avx512f -mno-avx512vl -mno-avx512pf -mno-avx512er -mno-avx512cd -mno-avx512dq -mno-avx512bw -mno-avx512ifma -mno-avx512vbmi -O3   CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/ControlButtonsPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/VOFolderProcessor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/VOViewerPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO.dir/VOViewerDrawableElements.cpp.o  -o ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/openMVG_main_AlternativeVO  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.12.8 ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/libopenMVG_image.a ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/libopenMVG_features.a ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/libopenMVG_stlplus.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.12.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.12.8 ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/libopenMVG_numeric.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjpeg.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtiff.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.so ../../../Linux-x86_64-Release/libopenMVG_fast.a
